overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's downtown district. The player moves from a covered walkway under an overpass past holographic NCPD signage, crosses a street with pedestrian and vehicle traffic, proceeds through a neon-lit urban canyon with massive building-sized advertisements, and ends in an open plaza with a fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, observing the illuminated billboards and NCPD hologram

entered.detail: large floating holographic sign displaying NIGHT CITY POLICE DEPARTMENT in cyan neon
palm tree trunk wrapped in digital cyan lighting panels
illuminated advertisement showing cartoon mascot and ALL FOODS text
large white advertisement for NICOLA showing headphones
large advertisement displaying JINGUII with reclining figure
concrete overpass roof covering the walkway above
simple concrete seating along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a concrete overpass in a covered walkway lined with palm trees wrapped in cyan neon lights. The massive NCPD hologram sign dominates the view ahead, while various illuminated billboards for All Foods, Nicola, and Jinguji line the left side. The ground features yellow tactile paving tiles, and the atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with mixed neon and shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: child pedestrian runs across the street from left to right ahead of the camera
exiting covered walkway and entering open street intersection with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching the street crossing and walking across the intersection as vehicles pass by in the background

notable_agents.action: child in red and white clothing running across the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: cluster of yellow and grey electrical utility boxes
wet asphalt road surface with yellow lane markings
illuminated traffic signal showing green

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into an open street intersection. A child runs across the crosswalk ahead while vehicles pass on the wet asphalt road. Yellow utility boxes line the left side, and the NCPD hologram sign recedes into the distance on the left. The lighting shifts from neon-dominated to a mix of streetlights and building illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with massive holographic advertisements

events.description: police car with blue neon underglow drives past the camera position
camera turns slightly right to navigate around the police vehicle and continue crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide multi-lane street while navigating around a police vehicle and observing the towering holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: police car with blue neon lights and NCPD markings moving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall building with large red PETROCHEM signage illuminated at the top
massive blue holographic advertisement showing an abstract figure on building facade
massive orange holographic advertisement showing a human figure on adjacent building
elevated highway or monorail track structure crossing overhead
cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a dense urban canyon with massive building-sized holographic advertisements in blue and orange hues dominating the skyline. The Petrochem building rises on the right with prominent red signage. A police car with glowing blue underlights moves through the intersection as the camera navigates across the wet asphalt. Elevated highway structures crisscross overhead against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with retail storefronts transitioning to open plaza

events.description: emerging from under the overpass into an open plaza with a central illuminated fountain

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past retail shops and concrete pillars, then emerging into a spacious plaza with a central water feature

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillars for the elevated highway above
retail storefront with illuminated windows displaying TECH SHOP signage
illuminated corporate signage for MILITECH
palm trees in raised concrete planters with integrated lighting
large cubic concrete blocks lining the walkway edge
rectangular water feature with blue illumination in the open plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under the elevated highway structure, passing between massive concrete pillars and retail storefronts including a Tech Shop. Palm trees in illuminated planters line the walkway. The camera emerges from the covered area into a spacious open plaza featuring a central illuminated fountain, with the dense skyline of Night City visible in the background. The transition from enclosed to open space marks the end of the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit covered walkway through a dense urban canyon and into a spacious open plaza. It begins under a concrete overpass where cyan neon-wrapped palm trees and a massive NCPD hologram dominate the view, moving past illuminated billboards and yellow tactile paving. As the camera emerges from the walkway, the scene opens into a street intersection with wet asphalt and passing vehicles, shifting the lighting from concentrated neon to a broader mix of streetlights. The perspective then pushes into a towering urban canyon filled with building-sized blue and orange holographic advertisements and the red signage of the Petrochem building, while elevated highways crisscross overhead. Finally, the camera passes between massive concrete pillars and retail storefronts before emerging from the shadows into a wide plaza centered around an illuminated fountain against the sprawling city skyline.
